headline: How Long Bloom Energy Stock Sits Underwater
summary: Its history in market shocks reveals a pattern of deep falls and long recoveries that every shareholder should understand.

headline: Air Products to Expand Integrated Gas Supply Network for Semiconductor Manufacturer in Taiwan
summary: Air Products (NYSE: APD), a world-leading industrial gases company, today announced Air Products San Fu has been awarded a long-term agreement to support a semiconductor manufacturer's expansion in Taiwan. The project will supply multiple new semiconductor fabs and back-end packaging facilities, supporting growing demand driven by artificial intelligence and high-performance computing.
